# platformStartExecution

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the platformStartExecution mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.platformStartExecution({ input: '<PlatformStartExecutionInput>' }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run platformStartExecution

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.platformStartExecution({ input: '<PlatformStartExecutionInput>' }).execute();
```
